title: AI-Enabled Web Hosting
description: Revolutionary hosting with built-in AI that lets you manage your website by simply talking to it in plain English. No technical skills required — just tell your site what you want changed and the AI handles the rest.
features: Update content by talking in plain English
targetAudience: Small business owners who want hands-off management
Non-technical users who need website updates
Busy professionals without time for manual updates
body: Our AI-Enabled hosting is a game-changer for small business owners. Instead of learning complicated website tools or hiring a developer for every small change, simply tell your website what you want in plain English. Want to update your hours? Add a new menu item? Change your homepage banner? Just say it and the AI makes it happen.
